Here's some killer questions that will help you in identifying what people really want and what they're willing to give up and what they're not willing to give up. Number one, what would you like to have if you could afford it? Number two, what do you have to have that you're not willing to give up? Number three, what do you have now that you'd like to have next time? Or what have you done before that you'd like to repeat? Number four, what would you like to have next time that you don't have now? Those are four great questions. You might want to replay here. It only takes 35 seconds and use these questions.
